title: myriopteris notholaenoides
intro: Myriopteris notholaenoides, also known as the notholaena fern or a type of maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Myriopteris notholaenoides include its potential to protect against oxidative stress, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
